edit-config.config:
<#if match\-any\-frame?has_content == false || match\-any\-frame == false>
${classifier\-name}_enhfilter bbf-qos-cls:${enhance\-filter\-operation} <#if src\-mac\-address>
enhfilter1
<#if src\-broadcast>
</#if> <#if src\-cfm\-multicast>
</#if> <#if src\-ipv4\-multicast>
</#if> <#if src\-ipv6\-multicast>
</#if> <#if src\-mac\-specific && src\-mac\-value?has_content && src\-mac\-mask?has_content> ${src\-mac\-value} ${src\-mac\-mask} </#if>
</#if> <#if dest\-mac\-address>
enhfilter2
<#if dest\-broadcast>
</#if> <#if dest\-cfm\-multicast>
</#if> <#if dest\-ipv4\-multicast>
</#if> <#if dest\-ipv6\-multicast>
</#if> <#if dest\-mac\-specific && dest\-mac\-value?has_content && dest\-mac\-mask?has_content> ${dest\-mac\-value} ${dest\-mac\-mask} </#if> <#if dest\-unicast>
</#if> <#if dest\-any\-multicast>
</#if>
</#if> <#if pbit\-list?has_content || dei?has_content>
enhfilter3
<#if pbit\-list?has_content>
0 ${pbit\-list}
</#if> <#if dei?has_content>
0 ${dei}
</#if>
</#if> <#if pbit\-marking\-list?has_content>
enhfilter4
0 <#list pbit\-marking\-list as pbitvalueentry> ${pbitvalueentry} </#list>
</#if> <#if dei\-marking\-list?has_content>
enhfilter5
0 ${dei\-marking\-list}
</#if> <#if ethernet\-frame\-type?has_content>
enhfilter6 ${ethernet\-frame\-type}
</#if> <#if src\-ipv4\-address?has_content || dest\-ipv4\-address?has_content>
enhfilter7
<#if src\-ipv4\-address?has_content> ${src\-ipv4\-address} </#if> <#if dest\-ipv4\-address?has_content> ${dest\-ipv4\-address} </#if>
</#if> <#if src\-ipv6\-address?has_content || dest\-ipv6\-address?has_content>
enhfilter8
<#if src\-ipv6\-address?has_content> ${src\-ipv6\-address} </#if> <#if dest\-ipv6\-address?has_content> ${dest\-ipv6\-address} </#if>
</#if> <#if ip\-version == "ipv4" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-all-filter" && !src\-ipv4\-address?has_content && !dest\-ipv4\-address?has_content> <#if dscp?has_content || protocol?has_content || src\-lower\-port?has_content || src\-upper\-port?has_content || dest\-lower\-port?has_content || dest\-upper\-port?has_content>
enhfilter7
0.0.0.0/0
</#if> </#if> <#if ip\-version == "ipv6" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-all-filter" && !src\-ipv6\-address?has_content && !dest\-ipv6\-address?has_content> <#if dscp?has_content || protocol?has_content || src\-lower\-port?has_content || src\-upper\-port?has_content || dest\-lower\-port?has_content || dest\-upper\-port?has_content>
enhfilter8
00::/0
</#if> </#if> <#if dscp?has_content || protocol?has_content>
enhfilter9
<#if dscp?has_content> ${dscp} </#if> <#if protocol?has_content> ${protocol} </#if>
<#if ip\-version == "ipv4" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-any-filter">
0.0.0.0/0
</#if> <#if ip\-version == "ipv6" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-any-filter">
00::/0
</#if>
</#if> <#if ((src\-lower\-port?has_content) && (src\-upper\-port?has_content)) || ((dest\-lower\-port?has_content) && (dest\-upper\-port?has_content))>
enhfilter10
<#if (src\-lower\-port?has_content) && (src\-upper\-port?has_content)>
${src\-lower\-port} ${src\-upper\-port}
</#if> <#if (dest\-lower\-port?has_content) && (dest\-upper\-port?has_content)>
${dest\-lower\-port} ${dest\-upper\-port}
</#if>
<#if ip\-version == "ipv4" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-any-filter">
0.0.0.0/0
</#if> <#if ip\-version == "ipv6" && enhance\-filter\-operation == "match-any-filter">
00::/0
</#if>
</#if> <#if protocols?has_content>
enhfilter11 <#list protocols as protocolentry> ${protocolentry} </#list>
</#if>
</#if>
${classifier\-name} match-all-filter <#if match\-any\-frame?has_content && match\-any\-frame>
<#else> ${classifier\-name}_enhfilter </#if> <#if pass\-action>
pass
</#if> <#if discard\-action>
bbf-qos-plc:discard
</#if> <#if pbit\-marking\-action && outer\-marking\-pbit?has_content>
pbit-marking
0 ${outer\-marking\-pbit}
<#if inner\-marking\-pbit?has_content>
1 ${inner\-marking\-pbit}
</#if>
</#if> <#if ccl\-policing\-action && policing\-profile\-name?has_content>
bbf-qos-plc:policing
${policing\-profile\-name}
</#if>
${ccl\-policy\-name}
${classifier\-name}
